query:
SELECT DISTINCT 
  s.id,
  s.brokerVendedorName,
  s.brokerVendedorEmail,
  s.saleDate,
  YEAR(s.saleDate) as ano,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY s.brokerVendedorEmail) as total_vendas
FROM sales s
WHERE s.brokerVendedorEmail LIKE '%@ex.baggioimoveis.com.br'
  AND YEAR(s.saleDate) IN (2024, 2025, 2026)
ORDER BY s.brokerVendedorEmail, s.saleDate DESC;

  s.saleDate,

FROM sales s
WHERE s.brokerVendedorEmail LIKE '%@ex.baggioimoveis.com.br'
  AND YEAR(s.saleDate) IN (2024, 2025, 2026)
